messages.content: Validate required fields and accumulate all errors before returning a result struct.
Validate email format using a regex pattern and return a structured result.
Validate that a numeric input falls within an acceptable inclusive range.
Enforce maximum string length on a user-supplied text field with a descriptive error message.
Validate that a start date is strictly before an end date using dateCompare.
Validate a CSRF token in a FW/1 before() method before allowing state-changing actions.
Sanitize and trim user text input before storage to remove HTML-dangerous characters.
Validate each item in a submitted array, collecting per-item errors with index references.
Before flagging a CFML string comparison as broken during QA, what should I validate about ## usage?
